AT_CF.comment: Set when the automatic gear box shall be configured.

CF_VSC_WAC_Buzzer_inhibited.comment: Current value saved in case of reset

lists.7: Fuel Shutoff Valve "A" Control Circuit High
lists.6: Fuel Shutoff Valve "A" Control Circuit Low
lists.3: Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit Low
lists.2: Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit Range/Performance
lists.4: Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit High

DTCExtendedData.Mileage.comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.151: Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.3: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding/ General Failure Information
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure

lists.3: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

FEEDBACK_WAC_1_TM_TP.comment: Duration of the first part of the jingle WAC

FEEDBACK_WAC_2_TM_TP.comment: Duration of the second part of the jingle WAC

IMMO_COUNTER_REMAINING_IGNITION_BEFORE_A.comment: This value is updated with the IMMO_COUNTER_IGNITION_S value (stored in E2P) at each APC raised and in case of reset.

No Problem on antennas or com reader
No Problem on IDE and PSW
lists.1: Problem IDE received not PSW if no other default

No Problem on antennas or com reader
No Problem on IDE and PSW

Each time the BCM received a request seed

Each time the ECU received a request seed
Each time the BCM received a request seed

lists.12: Tension d'entrée du SR trop haute
lists.7: Tme out de tension SR non atteinte

lists.4: Tension de sortie du SR trop basse

PPCC+12_Sur_Alim_Du_Lecteur_Badge.comment: Short to supply on card reader

PPCCMasse sur alim du lecteur badge.comment: Short to ground on card reader

PPCommLecteur de badge.comment: Failure on card reader serial line comm, detected also if supply failure

PPTrpAntenna.comment: Problem on card reader informations exchange

STACK_LOAD.comment:
Provide the value of stack depth measured by SWP.
(WITH_DEBUG_FRAME_CF shall be activated)

VAC_Nb_AuthentNonReussi.comment:
Incrémentation du compteur sur 2 octets à chaque authent VAC non réussie
Sauvegarde E2PROM

VSC BadgeFreq_315R.comment: Limited 315MHz card seen in card reader

VSC BadgeFreq_433K.comment:
Badge 433 mHz type Corée présent dans le lecteur.
0 par défaut.

VSC Code_IDE.comment: Laste card IDE authenticated or identified

VSC N\u00b0DuDernierBadge_Start_Stop.comment: Number of last card used for starting, stopping

VSC N\u00b0DuDernierBadgeAuthentifi\u00e.comment:
This value is updated only after an authentification of the card in the Reader.
After a power on of the BCM, the default value is not reliable ( not necessary 0).

VSC Nb_Authent_Total_DeCondaML.comment: Hands free unlocking counter, saved in EEPROM

VSC Nb_Authent_Total_Wac.comment: WAC locking counter, saved in EEPROM

VSC Nb_AuthentNonR\u00e9ussi_DeCondaML.comment: Hands free unachieved unlocking counter, saved in EEPROM

VSC NbTotalDeBadge_433K_Appris.comment: La valeur courante n'est pas perdue en cas de reset

VSC PSWTag.comment: ast password received during card exchange

lists.1: Pairing done or time out reached
Problem PSW not received or writing codes failed or failure authen.

lists.0: No Problem on antennas or com reader

lists.1: Problem IDE not received OR Key locked OR pairing complete for all keys OR Key pairing already performed OR wrong APV code  OR exit diag

VSC__UserIdentification.comment: Actualised on each authentication or identification

VSC_Count _Resync_ID1 1 octet modulo 25.comment:
Valeur par défaut = 0 
Après l’apprentissage badge ID1, Valeur = 0 
Incrémentation à chaque resynchronisation du badge 1 ( suite désynchro RKE ou Start Routine ANALYSE_CUSTOMER_ID  )  - La valeur courante est conservée en cas de reset.

VSC_Count _Resync_ID2 1 octet modulo 256.comment:
Valeur par défaut = 0
Après l’apprentissage badge ID2, Valeur = 1
Incrémentation à chaque resynchronisation du badge 2 ( suite désynchro RKE ou Start Routine ANALYSE_CUSTOMER_ID  )  - La valeur courante est conservée en cas de reset.

VSC_Count _Resync_ID3 1 octet modulo 25.comment:
Valeur par défaut = 0 à l’apprentissage
Après l’apprentissage badge ID3, Valeur = 1
Incrémentation à chaque resynchronisation du badge 3  ( suite désynchro RKE ou Start Routine ANALYSE_CUSTOMER_ID  ) - La valeur courante est conservée en cas de reset.

VSC_Etat Verlog ECU.comment: Result of the exchanges UCH ECM: protection state for BCM

lists.1: Authentification avec ISK du véhicule CID_MNGR_OPEN_STD_SESSION

Authorize or not warnings on the cluster.

VSC_Count _Resync_ID4 1 octet modulo 256.comment:
Valeur par défaut = 0 à l’apprentissage
Après l’apprentissage badge ID4, Valeur = 1
Incrémentation à chaque resynchronisation du badge 4   ( suite désynchro RKE ou Start Routine ANALYSE_CUSTOMER_ID  ) - La valeur courante est conservée en cas de reset.
